name: civil-materials-skills
description: Full-cycle civil engineering and construction-materials research skills for literature, writing, figures, data, PPTX, citations, and reviewer responses.

interface.shortDescription: Research workflows for civil materials manuscripts.
interface.longDescription: Use Civil Materials Skills to route civil engineering and construction-materials research tasks across literature reading, citation mapping, manuscript drafting, English polishing, figures, PPTX decks, FAIR data packages, reviewer simulation, and reviewer-response workflows.
defaultPrompt: Route this civil materials research task and check the evidence chain.
Build a source-grounded literature matrix for this manuscript topic.
Audit my figures, claims, and journal-fit risks before submission.
